subject: Poipole — a small needle-like Ultra Beast Pokémon with a round purple body, prominent horn, and small limbs, shown amid energy-charged surroundings
suspected_ip: Poipole (Pokémon Ultra Sun and Ultra Moon)
description: A small round-bodied creature with a prominent pointed horn atop its head floats in a swirling energy field of dark purple and magenta tones. Its compact body is deep purple with lighter markings, and its limbs are small and claw-like. The background radiates chaotic energy — concentric swirls and explosive light flares consistent with Ultra Beast presentation. The overall mood is energetic and slightly ominous, with the small creature at the center of a much larger turbulence.
foreground: Small purple horned creature with small clawed limbs
background: Swirling dark energy field with light flares
